bird.name: Nilgiri pipit
bird.summary: The Nilgiri pipit (Anthus nilghiriensis) is a distinctive species of pipit that is endemic to the high altitude hills of southern India. Ri…

locations.name: 帕拉尼
locations.summary: 帕拉尼（Palani），是印度泰米尔纳德邦Dindigul县的一个城镇。总人口67175（2001年）。 人口 该地2001年总人口67175人，其中男性33940人，女性33235人；0—6岁人口6719人，其中男3408人，女3311…

relations.subject: Nilgiri pipit
relations.evidence: Museum specimens exist from the Palani ranges but habitat changes may have led to its reduction or extirpation as the species was not found in surveys in the 21st century.{{cite journal|title=Reassessment of the distribution and threat status of the Western Ghats endemic bird, Nilgiri Pipit Anthus nilghiriensis|journal=Current Science|volume=107|issue=4|pages=622–630 |year=2014 |url=http://www.currentscience.ac.in/Volumes/107/04/0622.pdf|author1=Robin, V.V
